titles.title: A Song That We Will Sing in Heaven

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I began to practice For a song that we will sing It speaks about redemption What the love of God can do It speaks about His grace And His mercy so great That made Him bear the pain on Calvary

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Speaks about forgiveness For a wretched soul like me And goes on and on to thank Him And soon breaks into praise What remains so special Is the audience of this song It's a group of angels And saints, join the refrain

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We'll sing forever We have just begun As David strums his harp Bringing in the Psalms As the angels listen The Bride will lift her voice So glad to meet the Lord Forever to rejoice We'll sing forever

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Practicing for this song requires sacrifice As we get into the verses, it speaks about our lives How we ought to manifest Him to live all that we sing Sometimes it isn't easy When the battle gets so real

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The saints are waiting on us It says to raise them up We got all the material The message of our day We're the true worshippers Singing a new song Lifting up our voices With the trumpet in one voice

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We'll join with Miriam and her tambourine And Moses with his song David will come and dance What remains so sweet Is that we'll do it at His feet No one will be crying We won't be in a hurry We'll sing forever
